scenario: Single filer with W-2 wages ($32,000) enrolled in ACA marketplace plan; SLCSP $5,800, annual premium $5,400, APTC advanced $3,600; computed PTC ~$3,384 (FPL ~204%); excess APTC repayment $216 added to tax liability
source: IRS VITA Pub 4491 TY2025, illustrative case based on Health Care Coverage module (Form 8962 — excess advance Premium Tax Credit repayment); IRC §36B; Rev. Proc. 2025-15 (PTC applicable percentages TY2025)
